{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171921706FC1C9EB2F56526659"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7442933103959671578","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的角色塑造很鲜活，我特别喜欢刘邦这个人物，作者把他的痞子气和英雄气概都描绘得淋漓尽致。作者飘雪楼主的文笔也很幽默，让我在阅读的过程中常常忍俊不禁。而且这本书的历史细节描写得非常到位，感觉就像穿越到了汉朝一样。总之，这是一本很有趣、很值得一读的历史小说。","text_exts":[{"e":128,"s":124,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399836156526659%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227442933103959671578%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385471894205516862%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731190821,"group_id":"7385471894205516862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4CX3Mj6M6Hb2J0rdb6f2ETHbAO1+sR0B2ThzU/NQ9X4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1823463299355242","user_name":"喜欢伞树的何进"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1823463299355242","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385471894205516862","book_info":{"abstract":"汉朝开国皇帝刘邦的出生很奇特，据说乃其母王氏与蛟龙交媾而生。一生下来脚上就有七十二颗黑痣。这就注定了刘邦不是一般的人物。他小时候顽劣之极，令家人伤透了脑筋。而读书后，教书先生最终被他拖垮了。于是十八岁的刘邦离开学堂，开始了其流氓生活。正在这时，刘邦遇到了一生中最大的伯乐——萧何。在萧何的帮助下，刘邦当上了他人生中第一个官——亭长。而这个小小的事长却改变了刘邦的一生。他利用公务之便去了趟咸阳见到了秦始皇，因为羡慕秦始皇的风光，刘邦产生了“大丈夫当如是也”的想法。时值秦末天下大乱之际，刘邦斩白蛇起义，义无反顾地与项羽联袂踏上了推翻暴秦的漫漫征程……
一山容不下二虎，暴秦倒下了，项羽却站起来了。面对生平最大的对手，刘邦韬光养晦，去了荒无人烟的汉中。在韩信的帮助下，等时机成熟时，他终于出关，从而开始了与项羽长达四年之久的楚汉之争。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/14df94f7adfc88806075cbb6890c8fde~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"飘雪楼主","author_id":"","book_id":"7385471894205516862","book_name":"汉朝那些事儿.第1卷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#500808","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7386576941941279768","read_count":"1941","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"155704"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"139","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14df94f7adfc88806075cbb6890c8fde~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182361&x-signature=JVpdfSqWRVjK0Yb2c4YABl6N9eo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171921706FC1C9EB2F56526659"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18720,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":383},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7493419640710824729","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"用现代化的语言让我们深刻的感受到楚汉相争时代的精彩，最让我印象最深刻的便是历史的无关对错，项羽虽然败了，但其与虞姬的感情，与他的亲朋好友的义气无不让我心头一紧，他可能不是一个好的君王，但可以称为是一个英雄，可以成为一个好将才但无法成为一个真正的君王。刘邦没什么特别大的本事，也没有什么义气，但是他充满经济效益的思考方式，实事求是的行为作风最终帮他活了下来并取得了最终的胜利，也许这就是历史规律与我们中华文化的矛盾，虽可悲但凄美，虽壮烈却无法调和。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744703283,"group_id":"7385471894205516862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwEWQjlKkl9s+dQZjOAxxiBzhYqP50pJ0Y2QPxK/0TpL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/725ae3c53e684445a11bffb045e8149d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533821&x-signature=x%2BbevaIQ3JkuFq%2BYqe%2FLoBif9XY%3D","user_id":"1436418190882378","user_name":"进步不能停"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1436418190882378","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385471894205516862","book_info":{"abstract":"汉朝开国皇帝刘邦的出生很奇特，据说乃其母王氏与蛟龙交媾而生。一生下来脚上就有七十二颗黑痣。这就注定了刘邦不是一般的人物。他小时候顽劣之极，令家人伤透了脑筋。而读书后，教书先生最终被他拖垮了。于是十八岁的刘邦离开学堂，开始了其流氓生活。正在这时，刘邦遇到了一生中最大的伯乐——萧何。在萧何的帮助下，刘邦当上了他人生中第一个官——亭长。而这个小小的事长却改变了刘邦的一生。他利用公务之便去了趟咸阳见到了秦始皇，因为羡慕秦始皇的风光，刘邦产生了“大丈夫当如是也”的想法。时值秦末天下大乱之际，刘邦斩白蛇起义，义无反顾地与项羽联袂踏上了推翻暴秦的漫漫征程……
一山容不下二虎，暴秦倒下了，项羽却站起来了。面对生平最大的对手，刘邦韬光养晦，去了荒无人烟的汉中。在韩信的帮助下，等时机成熟时，他终于出关，从而开始了与项羽长达四年之久的楚汉之争。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/14df94f7adfc88806075cbb6890c8fde~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"飘雪楼主","author_id":"","book_id":"7385471894205516862","book_name":"汉朝那些事儿.第1卷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#500808","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7386576941941279768","read_count":"1941","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"155704"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"139","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14df94f7adfc88806075cbb6890c8fde~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182361&x-signature=JVpdfSqWRVjK0Yb2c4YABl6N9eo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"135"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171921706FC1C9EB2F56526659"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15147,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":595},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7546685693547774782","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好！喜欢这册还会再看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757108782,"group_id":"7385471894205516862","service_id":2,"
